name: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 175,000 Hilton Honors Bonus Points after spending $6,000 on eligible purchases within the first 6 months of card membership. Offer ends 4/15/26.

earning_rates.notes: Hilton Honors Bonus Points per dollar at hotels and resorts within the Hilton portfolio
Flights booked directly with the airline or through Amex Travel
U.S. restaurants, including takeout and delivery
Car rentals booked directly with select car rental companies

annual_credits.name: Hilton Resort Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $200 statement credit per half-year for eligible purchases made directly with participating Hilton resorts ($400 total annually)

annual_credits.name: Airline Fee Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $200 ($50 per quarter) statement credit for eligible flight purchases booked directly with airlines or through Amex Travel

annual_credits.name: CLEAR Plus Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $209 statement credit for CLEAR Plus membership

annual_credits.name: Free Night Reward
annual_credits.description: One free night reward every year on card renewal; second free night after $30,000 spend; third free night after $60,000 spend in a calendar year

lounge_access.other: Complimentary Amazon Room Access at select Hiltons; other lounge benefits through Premium Lodging events

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as card is open

other_benefits.name: National Emerald Club Executive Status
other_benefits.description: Car rental status with National Car Rental (enrollment required)

other_benefits.name: Space-Access Room Upgrades
other_benefits.description: Space-available room upgrades on each stay for Diamond members

other_benefits.name: Complimentary Breakfast
other_benefits.description: Complimentary breakfast or daily food-and-beverage credit at U.S. properties

other_benefits.name: Fifth Night Free
other_benefits.description: Fifth night free on reward stays (all Honors members)

sources.notes: Current welcome offers and earnings rates, April 2026
Detailed benefits overview including $400 resort credit, $200 airline credit, CLEAR+ credit, and free night rewards
Travel protections and rental insurance details
